name: sage-green
description: Warm sage-green Editorial video theme with tan paper surfaces, muted sage accent, serif editorial headlines, quiet hairlines, gentle paper atmosphere, and calm documentary pacing.
descriptionZh: 淡棕暖纸面、鼠尾草绿强调、衬线编辑标题、安静细线、柔和纸面氛围和克制纪录片节奏，适合人文解释、生活方式、品牌叙事、可持续议题和温和知识型 Editorial 视频。
